para.about-p1: Hello, my name is Tanasit Autrachai. I am a developer who recently graduated from Phuket Rajabhat University with a degree in Business Computer from the Faculty of Management Sciences. I have a strong passion for coding, problem-solving, and self-learning new skills.
para.portfolio-p1: My past work focuses on developing functional web applications. For example, I created a website for students to track their training hours, which was a final year project where I designed and built the entire backend system.
para.portfolio-p2: This project provided me with the opportunity to practice researching information from documentation and applying AI as a coding assistant to meet the specified requirements.
para.about-page-p1: I graduated from Phuket Rajabhat University with a degree in Business Computer from the Faculty of Management Sciences. I am a developer with a strong passion for coding, problem-solving, and self-learning new skills.
para.about-page-p2: I am highly motivated to grow as a Web Developer and am actively seeking an opportunity to apply my knowledge and skills to create real-world projects.
para.about-page-soft-skills-p1: Teamwork: Collaborates effectively to achieve shared goals and support team success.
para.about-page-soft-skills-p2: Continuous Learning: Self-driven to learn new technologies and adapt to industry changes.
para.about-page-soft-skills-p3: Communication: Clearly conveys ideas, project updates, and constructive feedback.
para.about-page-soft-skills-p4: Problem Solving: Analyzes challenges logically to identify and implement effective solutions.
para.portfolio-page-project-1-description: Developed a Learning Outcome Wallet (LO-Wallet) for Phuket Rajabhat University. A role-based web application featuring course management and a registration system, LO evaluation, and automated e-Certificate generation to enhance students' employability.
para.portfolio-page-project-2-description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills.

header.portfolio-page-project-1: Learning Outcomes Record System for the Office of Academic Resources and Information Technology, Phuket Rajabhat University (LO Wallet)
